name: visualization-r
description: Human-editable R visualization templates for static publication-style figures.

interface.longDescription: Provides general-purpose R/ggplot2 visualization templates. Plotting units are Templates, not Operators: users start from common styles, customize the generated editable source artifact, and optionally promote reusable styles into user or project preference templates.
defaultPrompt: Use visualization-r templates to create an editable static figure.
